destructive_cases.question: What are the names of badges that users who have the highest reputation obtained?
destructive_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT b.Name
FROM badges b
INNER JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
WHERE u.Reputation = (SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users)
destructive_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.Name
FROM badges b
INNER JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
WHERE u.Reputation = (SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users)

destructive_cases.question: What is the hero's full name with the highest attribute in strength?
destructive_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT s.full_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'Strength'
AND ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute ha2
    JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id
    WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'Strength'
)
destructive_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT s.full_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'strength'
AND ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute ha2
    JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id
    WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'strength'
)

destructive_cases.question: For the patient with the highest lactate dehydrogenase in the normal range, when was his or her data first recorded?
destructive_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT P."First Date"
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE L.LDH = (
    SELECT MAX(LDH) 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE LDH < 500
)
AND L.LDH < 500
destructive_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT P.Description
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE L.LDH = (
    SELECT MAX(LDH)
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE LDH < 500
)

neutral_cases.question: Which county reported the most number of school closure in the 1980s with school wonership code belonging to Youth Authority Facilities (CEA)?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT County
FROM schools
WHERE SOC = '11'
  AND strftime('%Y', ClosedDate) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989'
GROUP BY County
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt
        FROM schools
        WHERE SOC = '11'
          AND strftime('%Y', ClosedDate) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989'
        GROUP BY County
    )
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT County
FROM schools
WHERE SOC = 11
  AND ClosedDate >= '1980-01-01'
  AND ClosedDate <= '1989-12-31'
GROUP BY County
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt
        FROM schools
        WHERE SOC = 11
          AND ClosedDate >= '1980-01-01'
          AND ClosedDate <= '1989-12-31'
        GROUP BY County
    )
)

neutral_cases.question: What is the complete address of the school with the lowest excellence rate? Indicate the Street, City, Zip and State.
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.Zip, s.State
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds
WHERE CAST(sat.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / sat.NumTstTakr = (
    SELECT MIN(CAST(NumGE1500 AS REAL) / NumTstTakr)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumTstTakr != 0
)
AND sat.NumTstTakr != 0
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.Zip, s.State
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds
WHERE CAST(sat.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / sat.NumTstTakr = (
    SELECT MIN(CAST(NumGE1500 AS REAL) / NumTstTakr)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumTstTakr != 0
)
AND sat.NumTstTakr != 0

neutral_cases.question: List out the accounts who have the earliest trading date in 1995 ?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT account_id
FROM account
WHERE date LIKE '95%'
  AND date = (
    SELECT MIN(date)
    FROM account
    WHERE date LIKE '95%'
  )
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT account_id 
FROM account 
WHERE date >= '1995-01-01' AND date <= '1995-12-31'
  AND date = (
    SELECT MIN(date) 
    FROM account 
    WHERE date >= '1995-01-01' AND date <= '1995-12-31'
  )

neutral_cases.question: Name the account numbers of female clients who are oldest and have lowest average salary?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp di ON c.client_id = di.client_id
JOIN account a ON di.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(c2.birth_date) FROM client c2 WHERE c2.gender = 'F')
  AND d.A11 = (SELECT MIN(d2.A11) 
               FROM district d2 
               JOIN client c3 ON d2.district_id = c3.district_id 
               WHERE c3.gender = 'F')
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district di ON c.district_id = di.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
  AND di.A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district)

neutral_cases.question: Which Russian set of cards contains the most cards overall?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT s.name
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Russian'
AND s.totalSetSize = (
    SELECT MAX(s2.totalSetSize)
    FROM sets s2
    JOIN set_translations st2 ON s2.code = st2.setCode
    WHERE st2.language = 'Russian'
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT s.name
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Russian'
AND s.totalSetSize = (
    SELECT MAX(s2.totalSetSize)
    FROM sets s2
    JOIN set_translations st2 ON s2.code = st2.setCode
    WHERE st2.language = 'Russian'
)

neutral_cases.question: Of all the carcinogenic molecules, which one has the most double bonds?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT molecule_id
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) as bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE m.label = '+' AND b.bond_type = '='
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
)
WHERE bond_count = (
    SELECT MAX(bond_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) as bond_count
        FROM molecule m
        INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
        WHERE m.label = '+' AND b.bond_type = '='
        GROUP BY m.molecule_id
    )
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '+' AND b.bond_type = '='
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(bond_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) as bond_count
        FROM molecule m2
        JOIN bond b2 ON m2.molecule_id = b2.molecule_id
        WHERE m2.label = '+' AND b2.bond_type = '='
        GROUP BY m2.molecule_id
    )
)

    AND c2.convertedManaCost IS NOT NULL

neutral_cases.question: Is the molecule with the most double bonds carcinogenic?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT b.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = '='
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(cnt)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt
            FROM bond
            WHERE bond_type = '='
            GROUP BY molecule_id
        )
    )
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '='
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt
        FROM bond
        WHERE bond_type = '='
        GROUP BY molecule_id
    )
)

neutral_cases.question: When was the oldest mythic card released and what are its legal play formats?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT c.originalReleaseDate, l.format
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic'
  AND l.status = 'legal'
  AND c.originalReleaseDate = (
    SELECT MIN(c2.originalReleaseDate)
    FROM cards c2
    INNER JOIN legalities l2 ON c2.uuid = l2.uuid
    WHERE c2.rarity = 'mythic'
      AND l2.status = 'legal'
      AND c2.originalReleaseDate IS NOT NULL
  )
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT c.originalReleaseDate, l.format
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic'
  AND l.status = 'legal'
  AND c.originalReleaseDate = (
    SELECT MIN(c2.originalReleaseDate)
    FROM cards c2
    INNER JOIN legalities l2 ON c2.uuid = l2.uuid
    WHERE c2.rarity = 'mythic'
      AND l2.status = 'legal'
  )

    JOIN sets s2 ON c2.setCode = s2.code
    WHERE s2.name = 'Coldsnap'
      AND fd2.language = 'Italian'

neutral_cases.question: Provide the text of the latest comment to the post with the title 'Analysing wind data with R' and the display name of the user who left it.
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT c.Text, u.DisplayName
FROM comments c
INNER JOIN posts p ON c.PostId = p.Id
INNER JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Analysing wind data with R'
ORDER BY c.CreationDate DESC
LIMIT 1
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT c.Text, u.DisplayName
FROM comments c
INNER JOIN posts p ON c.PostId = p.Id
INNER JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Analysing wind data with R'
AND c.CreationDate = (
    SELECT MAX(c2.CreationDate)
    FROM comments c2
    INNER JOIN posts p2 ON c2.PostId = p2.Id
    WHERE p2.Title = 'Analysing wind data with R'
)

neutral_cases.question: Who is the dumbest superhero?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'Intelligence'
AND ha.attribute_value IS NOT NULL
AND ha.attribute_value > 0
AND ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MIN(ha2.attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute ha2
    JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id
    WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'Intelligence'
    AND ha2.attribute_value IS NOT NULL
    AND ha2.attribute_value > 0
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'Intelligence'
  AND ha.attribute_value IS NOT NULL
  AND ha.attribute_value > 0
  AND ha.attribute_value = (
      SELECT MIN(ha2.attribute_value)
      FROM hero_attribute ha2
      JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id
      WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'Intelligence'
        AND ha2.attribute_value IS NOT NULL
        AND ha2.attribute_value > 0
  )

  AND a.attribute_name = 'durability'

    JOIN publisher p2 ON s2.publisher_id = p2.id
    JOIN hero_attribute ha2 ON s2.id = ha2.hero_id
    JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id
    WHERE p2.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics'
      AND a2.attribute_name = 'durability'
  )

JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id

neutral_cases.question: What is the surname of the driver with the best lap time in race number 19 in the second period?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT d.surname
FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverId = q.driverId
WHERE q.raceId = 19
AND (
    q.q1 = (SELECT MIN(time_val) FROM (
        SELECT q1 AS time_val FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19 AND q1 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT q2 FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19 AND q2 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT q3 FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19 AND q3 IS NOT NULL
    ))
    OR q.q2 = (SELECT MIN(time_val) FROM (
        SELECT q1 AS time_val FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19 AND q1 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT q2 FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19 AND q2 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT q3 FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19 AND q3 IS NOT NULL
    ))
    OR q.q3 = (SELECT MIN(time_val) FROM (
        SELECT q1 AS time_val FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19 AND q1 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT q2 FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19 AND q2 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT q3 FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19 AND q3 IS NOT NULL
    ))
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
INNER JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE q.raceId = 19
AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL
AND q.q2 = (
    SELECT MIN(q2) 
    FROM qualifying 
    WHERE raceId = 19 
    AND q2 IS NOT NULL
)

neutral_cases.question: Which was Lewis Hamilton first race? What was his points recorded for his first race event?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT r.name AS race_name, res.points
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
ORDER BY r.date ASC
LIMIT 1
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT r.name AS race_name, res.points
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
ORDER BY r.year ASC, r.date ASC
LIMIT 1

neutral_cases.question: What is the most laps f1 races had? Name the race, year and circuit location where the races with most laps was hosted.
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT r.name, r.year, c.location
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE res.laps = (SELECT MAX(laps) FROM results)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT r.name AS race_name, r.year, c.location AS circuit_location
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE res.laps = (SELECT MAX(laps) FROM results)

neutral_cases.question: Which home team had lost the fewest matches in the 2016 season?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT T.team_long_name AS home_team
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE M.season = '2015/2016'
  AND M.home_team_goal < M.away_team_goal
GROUP BY M.home_team_api_id
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MIN(loss_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS loss_count
        FROM Match
        WHERE season = '2015/2016'
          AND home_team_goal < away_team_goal
        GROUP BY home_team_api_id
    )
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE M.season = '2015/2016' 
  AND M.home_team_goal < M.away_team_goal
GROUP BY M.home_team_api_id
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MIN(loss_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) as loss_count
        FROM Match
        WHERE season = '2015/2016'
          AND home_team_goal < away_team_goal
        GROUP BY home_team_api_id
    )
)

neutral_cases.question: List the players' api id who had the highest above average overall ratings in 2010.
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT pa.player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE strftime('%Y', pa.date) = '2010'
  AND pa.overall_rating = (
    SELECT MAX(pa2.overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes pa2
    WHERE strftime('%Y', pa2.date) = '2010'
      AND pa2.overall_rating > (
        SELECT AVG(pa3.overall_rating)
        FROM Player_Attributes pa3
        WHERE strftime('%Y', pa3.date) = '2010'
      )
  )
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating = (
    SELECT MAX(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
      AND overall_rating > (
        SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
        FROM Player_Attributes
        WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
      )
  )

neutral_cases.question: For the patient who has the highest Ig A within the normal range, what is his or her diagnosis?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT P.Diagnosis
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE L.IGA = (
    SELECT MAX(IGA)
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE IGA >= 80 AND IGA <= 500
)
AND L.IGA >= 80 AND L.IGA <= 500
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT P.Diagnosis
FROM Patient AS P
JOIN Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE L.IGA >= 80
  AND L.IGA <= 500
  AND L.IGA = (
    SELECT MAX(L2.IGA)
    FROM Laboratory AS L2
    WHERE L2.IGA >= 80
      AND L2.IGA <= 500
  )

neutral_cases.question: In Scotland Premier League, which away team won the most during the 2010 season?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT away_team_api_id
FROM Match
INNER JOIN League ON Match.league_id = League.id
WHERE League.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
  AND Match.season = '2009/2010'
  AND Match.away_team_goal > Match.home_team_goal
GROUP BY away_team_api_id
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(win_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) as win_count
        FROM Match
        INNER JOIN League ON Match.league_id = League.id
        WHERE League.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
          AND Match.season = '2009/2010'
          AND Match.away_team_goal > Match.home_team_goal
        GROUP BY away_team_api_id
    )
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT away_team_api_id
FROM Match
INNER JOIN League ON Match.league_id = League.id
WHERE League.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
  AND season = '2009/2010'
  AND away_team_goal > home_team_goal
GROUP BY away_team_api_id
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(win_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) as win_count
        FROM Match
        INNER JOIN League ON Match.league_id = League.id
        WHERE League.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
          AND season = '2009/2010'
          AND away_team_goal > home_team_goal
        GROUP BY away_team_api_id
    )
)

neutral_cases.question: What is the event that has the highest attendance of the students from the Student_Club?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt
        FROM attendance
        GROUP BY link_to_event
    )
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
WHERE e.event_id IN (
    SELECT a.link_to_event
    FROM attendance a
    GROUP BY a.link_to_event
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(attendance_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS attendance_count
            FROM attendance
            GROUP BY link_to_event
        )
    )
)

neutral_cases.question: What are the expenses of the budget with the lowest remaining?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT e.expense_description
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE b.remaining = (SELECT MIN(remaining) FROM budget)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT e.expense_description
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE b.remaining = (SELECT MIN(remaining) FROM budget)

neutral_cases.question: Which students manage to generate the highest income. State his/her full name along with the income source.
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, i.source
FROM member m
INNER JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE i.amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM income)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, i.source
FROM member m
INNER JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE i.amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM income)

neutral_cases.question: Which event has the lowest cost?
neutral_cases.baseline_sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING SUM(ex.cost) = (
    SELECT MIN(total_cost)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(ex2.cost) AS total_cost
        FROM event e2
        JOIN budget b2 ON e2.event_id = b2.link_to_event
        JOIN expense ex2 ON b2.budget_id = ex2.link_to_budget
        GROUP BY e2.event_id
    )
)
neutral_cases.agent_sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE b.spent = (SELECT MIN(b2.spent) FROM budget b2 WHERE b2.spent IS NOT NULL)
AND b.spent IS NOT NULL
